data.title: Elon Musk Says SpaceX Created History By Blasting Off A Rocket From One Country And Landing It Another: 'This is The First Time…'
data.description: SpaceX achieved a milestone on Tuesday by successfully landing a first-stage rocket booster off The Bahamas, marking the company's first international landing as it advances ambitious plans for Mars missions.

Elon Musk Has 'No Actual Authority To Make Government Decisions,' Says Trump White House On DOGE
data.description: Elon Musk faces legal scrutiny over allegations of excessive influence as a senior advisor to Trump, despite the White House insisting he lacks formal government authority.
